fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the specific chart.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the specific chart.

fields.name: Account Schedule Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the account schedule that is used to generate the chart that is shown in the Finance Performance window.

fields.name: Column Layout Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the column layout in the account schedule that is used to generate the advanced chart that is shown in the Finance Performance window.

fields.name: Base X-Axis on
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the values from the selected account schedule are displayed in the specific chart.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first date on which account schedule values are included in the chart.

fields.name: End Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date on which account schedule values are included in the chart.

fields.name: Period Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of periods in the chart.

fields.name: No. of Periods
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many periods are shown in the chart.

fields.name: Last Viewed
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Look Ahead
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if the chart shows data forward in time from the selected date.
If the check box is not selected, the chart shows data backwards in time from the selected date.
